title: FURIA Academy parts ways with four
description: FURIA parts ways with four members of its academy roster, shedding light on what roster planning in 2027 might look like.
author: jenopelle

title: KRÜ hints at end of KRÜ SPARK program, announces next steps
description: KRÜ SPARK appears to be nearing its end, with its remaining players set to try out for the main roster at the end of the year.
author: jenopelle

title: Nova, TYLOO stay undefeated in week two of Stage 2
description: Nova Esports and TYLOO continued to remain undefeated in week two of VCT China 2026 Stage 2, heading into the final week of the group stage.
author: weivy

title: Global Esports expands coaching booth with Aimix Strange, Fields
description: Platoon recruits some help in the GE coaching booth, adding two former Tier 2 head coaches.
author: jenopelle

title: Americas' recent victors start strong in week 1
description: Leviatán and 100 Thieves continue their ripe hot form after their respective international successes.
author: CongoBat

title: C0M replaces eeiu on FURIA's active lineup
description: The 2023 World Champion has taken eeiu's starter spot on FURIA.
author: ChickenJoe

title: Karmine Corp comes out on top of EMEA week 1 brawl
description: EMEA Stage 2 is underway with a wide open race for the four spots at Champions.
author: CongoBat

title: New-look Gen.G, VARREL rise after first week of Pacific Stage 2
description: Gen.G and VARREL on top? Three-Duelist meta?? primmie on Deadlock??? Week one had it all.
author: jenopelle

title: Game Changers Pacific heading to Bali, Indonesia
description: The final step in qualifying Pacific's teams to GCC will be headed to Bali.
author: jenopelle

title: DaviH rounds out LOUD for Stage 2
description: LOUD brings in EMEA talent for their Stage 2 run.
author: CongoBat

title: Xipto Esports signs 555 core ahead of Pacific Stage 2 Play-Ins
description: The Filipino org picks up the Thai squad as it gears up to play VCT Pacific squads next month.
author: jenopelle

title: LOUD welcomes tkzin on loan from KRÜ SPARK
description: LOUD has its Duelist player ahead of Stage 2.
author: jenopelle

title: GIANTX brings on Jesse to stand in for musz3kk
description: GX finds a stand-in as its rookie Duelist deals with visa delays.
author: jenopelle

title: Envy makes nightz official
description: The 18-year-old Controller player has finally made his way into the Americas League with Envy.
author: ChickenJoe

title: Iceman returns: Marved to stand in for Sentinels
description: Following an emergency appendectomy, johnqt will be sidelined for Sentinels for the near future.
author: jenopelle
